text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the spring Tenno Sho. Expectations are
high for Mejiro Palmer, Ikuno Dictus, Mejiro
McQueen, and Rice Shower.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thanks to word of her performance at the
Diamond Stakes, expectations are high for
Matikanetannhauser as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sparks fly as all these talented Umamusume face
off, and the spring Tenno Sho begins!
